Name: Marian Pirate Legion
Description: The Marian Hegemony has spent a century preying upon nearby trade routes and worlds as a means of keeping their economy functioning. Marian Pirate Legions are usually, but not always, state-sponsored, with the goal of inflicting instability on neighboring systems.
ReputationStatements: Foreign mercenaries lack discipline, honor, and proper loyalty. Still, even barbarians can fight.
Speak less. Kill more. You’ll find Romans appreciate efficiency.
Crush their defenders. A fearful population is a cooperative population.
The weak exist to serve the strong. Today, you serve us.
Spoils, slaves, salvage — victory has many rewards.
You have the discipline of legionaries and the appetite of conquerors. Admirable traits.
The Legion values proven allies. You’ve earned favorable standing here.
MissionSuccessStatements: Victory honors us both. The Legion rewards strength, and you've displayed plenty of it.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The Legion would not call this victory. Still, you fought with discipline.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Were you before us, we would have you whipped! Cowards have no place within the Legion.
